mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trip_member WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND invitation_status = 'ACCEPTED') AS totalTripCount, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT r.sido_name) FROM conquest_map cm JOIN region r ON cm.region_id = r.region_id WHERE cm.member_id = #{memberId}) AS visitedRegionCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trip t JOIN trip_member tm ON t.trip_id = tm.trip_id WHERE tm.member_id = #{memberId} AND tm.invitation_status = 'ACCEPTED' AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) > TRUNC(t.end_date)) AS completedTripCount, (SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG(t.end_date - t.start_date + 1), 1), 0) FROM trip t JOIN trip_member tm ON t.trip_id = tm.trip_id WHERE tm.member_id = #{memberId} AND tm.invitation_status = 'ACCEPTED') AS avgTripDays, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow WHERE follower_id = #{memberId}) AS followingCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow WHERE following_id = #{memberId}) AS followerCount FROM dual
SELECT DISTINCT r.sido_name FROM conquest_map cm JOIN region r ON cm.region_id = r.region_id WHERE cm.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY r.sido_name
SELECT DISTINCT r.sido_name FROM conquest_map cm JOIN region r ON cm.region_id = r.region_id WHERE cm.member_id = #{memberId} AND cm.trip_place_id IS NULL ORDER BY r.sido_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO conquest_map (conquest_map_id, member_id, region_id, conquest_date) SELECT SEQ_CONQUEST_MAP_ID.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, r.region_id, SYSDATE FROM region r WHERE r.sido_name = #{sidoName} AND r.api_sigungu_code IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM conquest_map cm WHERE cm.member_id = #{memberId} AND cm.region_id = r.region_id AND cm.trip_place_id IS NULL ) AND ROWNUM = 1
mapper.select: SELECT r.RESERVATION_ID AS "reservationId", r.ROOM_ID AS "roomId", r.CHECK_IN_DATE AS "checkIn", r.CHECK_OUT_DATE AS "checkOut", r.STATUS AS "status", p.PLACE_NAME AS "accommodationName", p.ADDRESS AS "address", rm.ROOM_NAME AS "roomName" FROM RESERVATION r JOIN ROOM rm ON r.ROOM_ID = rm.ROOM_ID JOIN ACCOMMODATION a ON rm.PLACE_ID = a.PLACE_ID JOIN PLACE p ON a.PLACE_ID = p.PLACE_ID WHERE r.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ORDER BY r.CHECK_IN_DATE DESC

SELECT c.conquest_map_id AS conquestMapId, c.member_id AS memberId, c.region_id AS regionId, r.sigungu_name AS sigunguName, c.color_code AS colorCode, TO_CHAR(c.start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDate, TO_CHAR(c.end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS endDate, c.memo AS memo, TO_CHAR(c.conquest_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS conquestDate FROM conquest_map c JOIN region r ON c.region_id = r.region_id WHERE c.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY c.conquest_map_id
SELECT photo_id AS photoId, conquest_map_id AS conquestMapId, photo_url AS photoUrl FROM conquest_map_photo WHERE conquest_map_id = #{conquestMapId} ORDER BY photo_id
SELECT region_id FROM region WHERE sigungu_name = #{sigunguName} FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_CONQUEST_MAP_ID.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO conquest_map ( conquest_map_id, member_id, region_id, color_code, start_date, end_date, memo, conquest_date ) VALUES ( #{conquestMapId}, #{memberId}, #{regionId}, #{colorCode}, TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{memo}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE conquest_map SET color_code = #{colorCode}, start_date = TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), end_date = TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), memo = #{memo}, conquest_date = SYSDATE WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND region_id = #{regionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO conquest_map_photo (photo_id, conquest_map_id, photo_url) VALUES (conquest_map_photo_seq.NEXTVAL, #{conquestMapId}, #{photoUrl})
mapper.select: SELECT f.following_id AS memberId, m1.login_id AS loginId, NVL(m2.nickname, m1.username) AS nickname, m2.profile_image AS profileImage FROM follow f JOIN member1 m1 ON f.following_id = m1.member_id LEFT JOIN member2 m2 ON f.following_id = m2.member_id WHERE f.follower_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY f.follow_id DESC

SELECT f.follower_id AS memberId, m1.login_id AS loginId, NVL(m2.nickname, m1.username) AS nickname, m2.profile_image AS profileImage FROM follow f JOIN member1 m1 ON f.follower_id = m1.member_id LEFT JOIN member2 m2 ON f.follower_id = m2.member_id WHERE f.following_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY f.follow_id DESC

SELECT r.REVIEW_ID AS reviewId, r.PLACE_ID AS placeId, p.PLACE_NAME AS placeName, p.CATEGORY AS placeCategory, r.RATING AS rating, r.CONTENT AS content, r.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, r.UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt, r.HELPFUL_COUNT AS helpfulCount, r.START_DATE AS visitDate, (SELECT LISTAGG(ri.IMAGE_URL, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ri.REVIEW_IMG_ID) FROM REVIEW_IMG ri WHERE ri.REVIEW_ID = r.REVIEW_ID) AS images FROM PLACE_REVIEW r JOIN PLACE p ON r.PLACE_ID = p.PLACE_ID WHERE r.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ORDER BY r.CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT res.RESERVATION_ID AS "reservationId", res.PLACE_ID AS "placeId", p.PLACE_NAME AS "placeName", p.CATEGORY AS "placeCategory", TO_CHAR(res.CHECK_IN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "checkInDate", TO_CHAR(res.CHECK_OUT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "checkOutDate" FROM RESERVATION res JOIN ROOM rm ON res.ROOM_ID = rm.ROOM_ID JOIN PLACE p ON rm.PLACE_ID = p.PLACE_ID WHERE res.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND res.STATUS = 'SUCCESS' AND res.CHECK_OUT_DATE < SYSDATE AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM PLACE_REVIEW pr WHERE pr.RESERVATION_ID = res.RESERVATION_ID ) ORDER BY res.CHECK_OUT_DATE DESC FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY

SELECT l.LIKE_ID AS "likeId", l.TARGET_ID AS "targetId", l.TARGET_TYPE AS "targetType", l.CREATED_AT AS "createdAt",
p.PLACE_NAME AS "targetName", p.ADDRESS AS "address", p.IMAGE_URL AS "imageUrl"
TO_CHAR(SUBSTR(f.CONTENT, 1, 50)) AS "targetName", NULL AS "address", f.IMAGE_URL AS "imageUrl"
fb.TITLE AS "targetName", NULL AS "address", fb.THUMBNAIL_URL AS "imageUrl"
FROM LIKES l
LEFT JOIN PLACE p ON l.TARGET_ID = p.PLACE_ID AND p.IS_ACTIVE = 1
LEFT JOIN FEED_POST f ON l.TARGET_ID = f.POST_ID
LEFT JOIN FREEBOARD fb ON l.TARGET_ID = fb.BOARD_ID
WHERE l.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND l.TARGET_TYPE = #{type} ORDER BY l.CREATED_AT DESC
